title: JWK Management
description: Create crypto service that generates RSA-2048 and ES256 key pairs, stores them in DB with key ID and activation/expiration dates. Implement /auth/jwks endpoint serving public keys in JWK Set format. Add scheduled task for key rotation (new key every 30 days, old keys valid 60 more days).
validation: Keys stored in DB with key_id, activation_date, expiration_date
Scheduled task for key rotation implemented
Old keys valid for 60 additional days
deliverables: CryptoService with RSA-2048 and ES256 key generation (src/agentauth/services/crypto.py)
